name: Life and death are predetermined by heaven
short_description: Angels, messengers from heaven. Representing holiness, goodness, integrity, the messenger of God's will, the spirit serving God, and the protector sent by God to protect believers from demon invasion.
detailed_description:
In the depths of the distant universe, there is a mysterious realm surrounded by stars - the Heavenly Realm. Here live angels with wings and halos, who govern light and hope, and are guardians of the universe. However, on the edge of the heavenly realm, there is a forgotten dark land where an ancient and evil creature - the undead - resides.

The undead were once outstanding among angels, but due to greed and jealousy, they betrayed the light, were deprived of wings and halos, and forever imprisoned in darkness. As time passed, their resentment grew stronger and they longed to return to the heavens and regain everything they had lost.

Finally, one day, the leader of the undead - the Lord of Darkness - gathered the power of all undead and launched a war against the heavens. The angels were caught off guard by the sudden attack, and the defense line at the edge of the celestial realm quickly collapsed.

At this critical moment, the supreme ruler of the heavens, the Lord of Radiance, summoned all the angels and held a solemn oath taking ceremony. He said, "We are messengers of light and guardians of hope. No matter how powerful the undead may be, as long as we unite as one, light will eventually dispel darkness

The angels were inspired by the words of the Radiant Lord and spread their wings high, welcoming the army of the undead. In the sky, light and darkness intertwine, the flapping of wings and the mournful cries of the dead intertwine, forming a battle that shakes the universe.

In this battle, the angels demonstrated astonishing courage and wisdom. They used the power of light to create various magical weapons and shields, and engaged in a life and death struggle with the undead. And the spirits of the dead are not to be outdone. They use the power of darkness to release terrifying curses and magic, attempting to devour all light.

The battle lasted for several days, leaving deep scars on both the heavens and the dark lands. However, under the leadership of the Radiant Lord, the angels gradually gained the upper hand. They found that although the undead were powerful, their hearts were filled with fear and despair. So, the angels began to purify the souls of the dead with the power of light, allowing them to feel warmth and hope again.

In the end, in a decisive battle, the Lord of Glory personally confronted the Lord of Darkness. The collision of the two leaders made the entire universe tremble. After a fierce battle, the Lord of Glory finally defeated the Lord of Darkness and sealed him back to the land of darkness.

The undead have lost their leaders and scattered one after another. Through the efforts of the angels, many of them were purified and reborn, becoming guardians of the light. And the heavens were also reborn in this war, becoming more prosperous and powerful.

From then on, the war between angels and the undead became a legend. But the angels will always remember the lesson of this battle: only by uniting as one, holding onto light and hope, can we overcome all darkness and evil. And the spirits of the deceased also understood that true power does not come from darkness and curses, but from the light and kindness within

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, French, Italian, German, Russian, Spanish - Latin America
